pages.raw_text:
I think the alcoholic drinks should
be done away with all together.


Some doctors give alcohol in medi-
cine and so, in many cases, make
drunkards of their patients.


1t stimulates them little at first,
but in the end they are weaker than
they were before. Some people say
that liquor will never hurt anybody if
they let it alone. but does it not
hurt the poor mother to see her son
come home drunk?


If all the money that was spent for
liquor was spent to beautify the homes
and country, this would be the most
beautiful and richest country In the
world. There are Christian presi-
dents who have allowed liquor to be
sold and thereby caused very many
deaths by liquor. There is party
called 1.-The prohibition party" that
is trying to do away with this liquor
selling, and ! think that anybody who
does not like the liquor business should
vote for prohibition" man for pres
ident. LYLE Mccoy.
